task_completion.description: OpenVSP is open with the eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 model loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP application window is visible, showing an aircraft geometry (wing and tail). The window title or geometry browser indicates 'eCRM-001_wing_tail'.

task_completion.description: Wing component parameter bounds are set to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OpenVSP's component GUI or Variable Manager, the Wing's Span bounds are [55.0, 65.0], Root_Chord bounds are [10.0, 14.0], and Tip_Chord bounds are [2.0, 4.0].

task_completion.description: Horizontal Tail component parameter bounds are set to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OpenVSP's component GUI or Variable Manager, the Horizontal Tail's Span bounds are [16.0, 22.0] and Root_Chord bounds are [3.5, 5.5].

task_completion.description: The modified model is saved as eCRM001_mdao.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'eCRM001_mdao.vsp3', or the OpenVSP window title updated to 'eCRM001_mdao.vsp3', or a file manager showing the new file in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/.

task_completion.description: A summary report is written to desvar_summary.txt listing the modified variables and bounds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open showing the file 'desvar_summary.txt' (saved to the Desktop), containing text that lists the 5 modified variables (Wing Span, Wing Root Chord, Wing Tip Chord, Tail Span, Tail Root Chord) and their new lower and upper bounds.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP interface being used to change bounds, rather than a text editor modifying the .vsp3 XML file directly.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to create the summary report.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or VS Code) is visible with the report content, rather than just terminal echo commands.

integrity.description: The actual eCRM-001 model is loaded in OpenVSP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view in OpenVSP shows a realistic wing and tail geometry, not an empty or default model.
